## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? -->

## What changed

<!-- Keep this focused on behavior and architecture. -->

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run build`

## Risk review

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, customer data, or `.env` files included
- [ ] Error paths and invalid inputs considered
- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Backward compatibility reviewed
- [ ] Database migration included or not required
- [ ] Documentation updated or not required
